project_summary: App for tasks between me, my wife and kids in the house, should be confortable to use on mobile and have realtime updates with supabase

issues.title: Initialize Monorepo Structure and Tooling
issues.description: Establish the monorepo workspace using pnpm workspaces to manage React frontend and FastAPI backend packages, including unified linting and formatting rules.
issues.scope: Root directory configuration, package.json workspaces, ESLint/Prettier setup.

testing_tasks: Verify linting runs across both packages

criteria: Linting and formatting rules applied globally

recommended_commits: chore: configure shared linting and formatting
issues.notes: Ensure pnpm is used as the package manager for workspace support.

issues.title: Define MongoDB Mongoose Schemas
issues.description: Implement Mongoose models for Users, Tasks, and Households to ensure data integrity within the MongoDB instance.

testing_tasks: Write unit tests for schema validation

criteria: Schemas defined for all core entities
Validation rules enforced for required fields

recommended_commits: feat: add user, task, and household schemas
issues.notes: Ensure schemas support MongoDB ObjectId references for relational mapping.

issues.title: Implement Environment Variable Management
issues.description: Configure a centralized environment variable strategy using pydantic-settings for FastAPI and Vite's .env system for React.
issues.scope: Root .env.example, backend config module, frontend .env files.

testing_tasks: Verify env loading in local dev
documentation_tasks: Update README with required env keys

criteria: Sensitive keys excluded from version control

issues.notes: Ensure Supabase and MongoDB connection strings are handled securely.

issues.title: Configure GitHub Actions CI/CD Pipeline
issues.description: Set up automated workflows for linting, testing, and deployment to Vercel on push to main/develop branches.

documentation_tasks: Add CI status badge to README

criteria: Vercel deployment triggers on merge to main

issues.notes: Use Vercel CLI for deployment automation.

issues.title: Create Docker Compose for Local Development
issues.description: Define a docker-compose.yml file to spin up a local MongoDB instance and the FastAPI backend service.

criteria: Database and API start with one command

recommended_commits: feat: add docker-compose for local dev
issues.notes: Ensure the MongoDB container is accessible by the FastAPI service via internal network.

issues.title: Configure React Query and Supabase Client
issues.description: Initialize the React Query provider and the Supabase client instance for real-time data synchronization.
recommended_commits: feat: initialize react query and supabase client
issues.notes: Ensure the Supabase client uses the environment variables defined in setup-003.

issues.title: Implement User Registration Pydantic Models
issues.description: Define robust Pydantic schemas for user registration, including validation for email formats, password complexity, and household association IDs.
issues.scope: FastAPI models and request validation logic

documentation_tasks: Update API docs with schema definitions

issues.notes: Ensure password hashing uses bcrypt or argon2.

issues.title: Develop Task CRUD Endpoints
issues.description: Implement the core REST API endpoints for managing household tasks (POST, GET, PUT, DELETE).

criteria: Tasks can be created with title/description
Tasks are retrieved by household ID

issues.notes: Ensure all endpoints are scoped to the authenticated user's household.

issues.title: Implement Household Creation Logic
issues.description: Create logic to initialize a new household and assign the creator as the primary parent.
issues.notes: Invite codes should be short, alphanumeric strings.

issues.title: Implement Member Invitation Logic
issues.description: Develop endpoints to allow parents to invite new members to an existing household.

implementation_tasks: Add user to household members list

criteria: Valid invite code adds user to household

issues.notes: Consider rate-limiting the invitation endpoint.

issues.title: Implement RBAC Middleware
issues.description: Create FastAPI dependency injection middleware to enforce role-based access control for task modifications.
recommended_commits: refactor: apply RBAC to task routes
issues.notes: Use FastAPI's Depends mechanism for clean implementation.

issues.title: Create Task Completion Analytics Endpoint
issues.description: Develop an endpoint to aggregate task completion data per user for the dashboard.

criteria: Returns count of completed tasks per user

issues.notes: Use MongoDB aggregation framework for performance.

issues.title: Configure Database Connection Pool
issues.description: Setup Motor (async MongoDB driver) connection pooling for the FastAPI application.

criteria: App connects to MongoDB on startup

issues.notes: Ensure connection string is pulled from environment variables.

issues.title: Setup Pytest Integration Framework
issues.description: Configure Pytest with TestClient for FastAPI to enable integration testing.

testing_tasks: Write smoke test for root endpoint

criteria: Test database is cleared after each test

issues.notes: Use a separate MongoDB database for testing.

issues.title: Document API Schema and Authentication
issues.description: Generate and refine OpenAPI documentation for all implemented endpoints.

implementation_tasks: Define response models for all routes

issues.notes: Use FastAPI's built-in OpenAPI generation.

issues.title: Fix Race Condition in Task Status Updates
issues.description: Ensure task status updates are atomic to prevent concurrent modification issues.

implementation_tasks: Implement optimistic locking or atomic updates

criteria: Concurrent updates do not corrupt data
Atomic operations used for status changes

recommended_commits: fix: use atomic updates for task status
issues.notes: Use $set with versioning if necessary.

issues.title: Configure Vercel Serverless Deployment
issues.description: Configure vercel.json to support FastAPI deployment on Vercel serverless functions.
issues.notes: Ensure environment variables are mapped correctly in Vercel dashboard.

issues.title: Implement Responsive Bottom Navigation for Mobile
issues.description: Develop a persistent bottom navigation bar for mobile devices that provides quick access to Dashboard, Add Task, and Profile views.

testing_tasks: Test navigation flow on mobile viewport

criteria: Nav bar is fixed to bottom on mobile
Icons change color on active route

issues.notes: Ensure z-index is handled correctly to avoid overlap with content.

issues.title: Build Task List Component with Filtering
issues.description: Create a reusable TaskList component that supports filtering by status (pending/completed) and sorting by due date.

criteria: Empty state shown when no tasks match

recommended_commits: feat: add filtering and sorting logic
issues.notes: Use memoization for list rendering to optimize performance.

issues.title: Develop Reusable Add Task Modal
issues.description: Create a portal-based modal component for creating and editing tasks, including form validation.

testing_tasks: Verify modal close on backdrop click

issues.notes: Ensure accessibility (A11y) by managing focus trap.

issues.title: Implement User Profile and Theme Toggle
issues.description: Build the profile settings page allowing users to update display name and toggle between light/dark themes.
issues.notes: Use system preference as default theme.

issues.title: Configure TanStack Query Provider
issues.description: Set up the React Query client and provider to manage server state and caching for tasks.
issues.notes: Set staleTime to 5 minutes to reduce unnecessary network requests.

issues.title: Implement Task Creation Mutation
issues.description: Connect the Add Task Modal to the backend using React Query mutations.

testing_tasks: Verify task appears in list after creation

issues.notes: Use queryClient.invalidateQueries to refresh task list.

issues.title: Add Loading Skeletons for Dashboard
issues.description: Implement skeleton loaders to improve perceived performance while tasks are fetching.

testing_tasks: Verify skeleton visibility during network delay

issues.notes: Ensure skeleton animation is subtle.

issues.title: Implement Task Completion Toggle
issues.description: Add functionality to mark tasks as complete directly from the dashboard.

testing_tasks: Verify task status updates in DB

issues.notes: Ensure the toggle is disabled while the mutation is in progress.

issues.title: Add Error Boundary for Frontend
issues.description: Implement a global error boundary to catch and display errors gracefully.

criteria: App does not white-screen on error

issues.notes: Include a 'Retry' button in the fallback UI.

issues.title: Implement Responsive Sidebar for Desktop
issues.description: Add a sidebar navigation for desktop viewports that complements the mobile bottom nav.

implementation_tasks: Use Tailwind media queries for visibility

issues.notes: Use flexbox for layout structure.

issues.title: Add Toast Notifications for Actions
issues.description: Implement a toast notification system to provide feedback on task creation and updates.
issues.notes: Keep toast duration short (3s).

issues.title: Implement Supabase Auth Provider in React
issues.description: Set up the Supabase Auth context to manage user session state across the application.

testing_tasks: Verify session persistence on page refresh

criteria: User session persists after browser refresh
Auth state is accessible via hook

recommended_commits: feat: add auth context and provider
issues.notes: Ensure sensitive keys are loaded from environment variables.

issues.title: Configure Axios Interceptors for JWT Injection
issues.description: Create an Axios instance that automatically attaches the Supabase JWT to the Authorization header for FastAPI requests.

implementation_tasks: Add request interceptor to inject Bearer token
testing_tasks: Verify JWT is present in request headers

criteria: All API calls include Authorization header

recommended_commits: feat: setup axios instance with interceptors
issues.notes: Ensure the interceptor handles the async nature of getting the Supabase session.

issues.title: Implement Supabase Realtime Task Subscription
issues.description: Connect the frontend to Supabase Realtime to listen for changes in the tasks collection.

implementation_tasks: Integrate with React Query cache invalidation
testing_tasks: Verify UI updates when database changes

criteria: Tasks update instantly when modified in DB
Subscription cleans up on component unmount

recommended_commits: refactor: integrate realtime with react query
issues.notes: Use React Query's queryClient.invalidateQueries to trigger re-fetches.

issues.title: Implement Task Completion Toggle Logic
issues.description: Connect the task checkbox component to the backend API to persist completion status.

setup_tasks: Define API endpoint for status update
implementation_tasks: Create mutation hook for task status

recommended_commits: feat: implement optimistic UI for tasks
issues.notes: Ensure error rollback is implemented for optimistic updates.

issues.title: Implement Global Error Handling Middleware
issues.description: Create a centralized error handling mechanism for API failures and network issues.

implementation_tasks: Map backend error codes to user-friendly messages

criteria: User sees toast notification on error
App does not crash on API failure

issues.notes: Use a library like react-hot-toast for notifications.

issues.title: Secure FastAPI Routes with JWT Validation
issues.description: Implement dependency injection in FastAPI to validate Supabase JWTs on incoming requests.

criteria: Valid requests allow access to user data

issues.notes: Ensure the public key is fetched from Supabase.

issues.title: Sync MongoDB User Schema with Supabase Auth
issues.description: Ensure that when a user signs up via Supabase, a corresponding document is created in MongoDB.

implementation_tasks: Create FastAPI endpoint for user profile creation
Trigger profile creation on auth success
testing_tasks: Verify user document creation on signup

criteria: User exists in MongoDB after signup

issues.notes: Consider using a database trigger or a post-signup API call.

issues.title: Implement Protected Routes in React Router
issues.description: Restrict access to application routes based on authentication state.

testing_tasks: Verify redirect to login when unauthenticated

criteria: Authenticated users are redirected from login

issues.notes: Handle the loading state while checking auth status.

issues.title: Implement CORS Policy for FastAPI
issues.description: Configure CORS middleware in FastAPI to allow requests from the Vercel frontend domain.

implementation_tasks: Set allowed origins, methods, and headers

issues.notes: Use environment variables for allowed origins.

issues.title: Setup Integration Test Suite
issues.description: Create a base test suite for verifying the integration between frontend, backend, and database.

implementation_tasks: Create base test setup for API
Create base test setup for UI
testing_tasks: Run smoke tests for auth flow
documentation_tasks: Document how to run integration tests

criteria: Auth flow is covered by tests

issues.notes: Use a separate test database for integration tests.

issues.title: Implement PyTest Suite for Task Business Logic
issues.description: Develop a comprehensive unit testing suite for the FastAPI backend, focusing on task creation, assignment validation, and status transition logic.
issues.scope: Backend service layer and domain logic within the FastAPI application.

implementation_tasks: Write tests for task validation schemas

criteria: Minimum 80% code coverage for task-related services
All tests pass in CI environment

recommended_commits: test: add unit tests for task service
issues.notes: Ensure database interactions are mocked to prevent side effects in the development MongoDB instance.

issues.title: Setup Vitest and RTL for UI Components
issues.description: Configure the frontend testing environment and implement unit tests for core UI components like TaskCard and TaskList.
issues.scope: React components in the src/components directory.

implementation_tasks: Create test files for TaskCard component
Implement mock data providers for React Query

criteria: TaskCard renders correctly with mock props
User interactions trigger expected state changes

recommended_commits: test: add unit tests for TaskCard component
issues.notes: Use MSW (Mock Service Worker) if necessary to mock API responses for React Query hooks.

issues.title: End-to-End Integration Tests for Task Lifecycle
issues.description: Implement integration tests to verify the flow between the frontend, FastAPI backend, and Supabase Realtime updates.
issues.scope: Full stack flow from UI action to database persistence and real-time broadcast.

setup_tasks: Set up test database cleanup scripts
implementation_tasks: Write test for task creation flow
Verify real-time update reception in a second client instance
testing_tasks: Verify database state after test completion

criteria: Task creation reflects in DB and UI simultaneously

recommended_commits: test: add e2e task creation flow
issues.notes: Requires a dedicated test environment in Supabase to avoid polluting production data.

issues.title: Performance Audit: Latency and Load Times
issues.description: Audit the application's performance, specifically focusing on initial load times and the latency of Supabase Realtime broadcasts.
issues.scope: Frontend bundle size and WebSocket message latency.

setup_tasks: Install Lighthouse CI or similar performance tools
implementation_tasks: Identify bottlenecks in API response time
testing_tasks: Run performance audits under simulated load

issues.notes: Focus on optimizing React Query cache settings if latency is high.

issues.title: Conduct User Acceptance Testing (UAT) Sessions
issues.description: Facilitate manual testing sessions with target users (families) to validate usability and identify workflow friction.
issues.scope: Application UI/UX and core task management workflows.

documentation_tasks: Summarize UAT findings and action items

criteria: Critical usability blockers identified and logged

issues.notes: Ensure testers have clear instructions on how to report bugs found during the session.

issues.title: Configure Vercel Production Build Pipeline
issues.description: Establish the CI/CD pipeline on Vercel for the React frontend and FastAPI backend, ensuring environment variables are correctly injected and build commands are optimized.
issues.scope: Vercel project settings, vercel.json configuration, and environment variable mapping.

setup_tasks: Link GitHub repository to Vercel project
implementation_tasks: Map Supabase and MongoDB connection strings to Vercel environment variables
testing_tasks: Test frontend routing with React Router
documentation_tasks: Update README with deployment environment variable requirements

criteria: Environment variables are accessible to the runtime
App is accessible via Vercel preview URL

issues.notes: Ensure sensitive keys are marked as 'Secret' in Vercel dashboard.

issues.title: Implement MongoDB Production Indexes
issues.description: Apply necessary indexes to MongoDB collections to ensure query performance for task retrieval and user authentication in a production environment.
issues.scope: MongoDB Atlas collections: users, tasks, and households.

setup_tasks: Connect to production MongoDB instance via shell
implementation_tasks: Create compound index on tasks (household_id, status)
testing_tasks: Run explain() on common queries to verify index usage
documentation_tasks: Document index strategy in database schema file

criteria: Queries for tasks by household_id return in < 100ms
Unique constraint on user email is enforced

recommended_commits: feat: add compound indexes for task queries
perf: add unique index to user email
issues.notes: Use background indexing to avoid blocking production traffic.

issues.title: Configure Custom Domain and SSL
issues.description: Point the production domain to Vercel and ensure SSL/TLS certificates are automatically provisioned and active.
issues.scope: DNS settings and Vercel domain configuration.

setup_tasks: Update DNS A/CNAME records at registrar
implementation_tasks: Add domain to Vercel project settings
documentation_tasks: Update project documentation with production URL

issues.notes: Propagation may take up to 24 hours.

issues.title: Integrate Sentry for Error Tracking
issues.description: Set up Sentry SDK in both the React frontend and FastAPI backend to capture runtime exceptions and performance bottlenecks.
issues.scope: Sentry project initialization and SDK integration.

implementation_tasks: Add Sentry middleware to FastAPI app
testing_tasks: Trigger test error to verify Sentry dashboard capture
documentation_tasks: Add monitoring section to internal wiki

recommended_commits: feat: integrate sentry for error tracking
issues.notes: Ensure DSN is not exposed in client-side source maps if possible.

issues.title: Automate MongoDB Backup Strategy
issues.description: Configure automated daily snapshots for the MongoDB database to ensure data recovery capability in case of catastrophic failure.

testing_tasks: Perform a test restore to a staging cluster

issues.notes: Verify costs associated with cloud backups in Atlas.

issues.title: Production Security Hardening
issues.description: Implement security headers and CORS policies to protect the application from common web vulnerabilities in production.
issues.scope: FastAPI middleware and Vercel security headers.

testing_tasks: Run security audit via browser dev tools

criteria: No sensitive info leaked in headers

recommended_commits: feat: add security headers and CORS policy
issues.notes: Be careful with CSP; start with report-only mode if necessary.

issues.title: Implement OpenAPI/Swagger Documentation for FastAPI
issues.description: Configure FastAPI to automatically generate OpenAPI schemas and expose the Swagger UI for all backend endpoints.
issues.scope: FastAPI application layer, specifically route decorators and Pydantic models.

Configure OpenAPI metadata in FastAPI app instance

Authentication headers are visible in Swagger UI

issues.title: Create Local Development Environment Setup Guide
issues.description: Develop a comprehensive README.md section detailing how to clone, configure, and run the project locally.

issues.description: Create a user-friendly guide explaining how to perform core tasks: creating an account, joining a family, and completing chores.

issues.description: Create a guide for deploying the application to Vercel (frontend) and a cloud provider (FastAPI backend).
